scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w apps/client-spa" "npm run dev -w apps/server-api"
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/client-spa && npm run build -w apps/server-api
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w apps/client-spa && npm run lint -w apps/server-api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w apps/client-spa && npm run typecheck -w apps/server-api
